name: nick-starter
description: Starter kit for beginners: run /onboard to be interviewed (English, Vietnamese, Thai, Korean, Chinese — or any language you name) and get a personalized AI assistant — its own name, personality, goals, persistent memory, a ready second-brain vault, AND custom skills it forges automatically for your profession and goal. Core skills: work-smart, remember, recall, learn-from-mistakes, daily-note, personal, leader, create-skill, forge-skills, obsidian-markdown, obsidian-cli.
